# Documentation draft

> This is an AI-assisted first draft based on material the human already defined.
> It is a starting point for editing, not final documentation. Review every
> claim and resolve all placeholders before using it.

## Artifact type and audience

_What kind of doc this is (public user doc, internal note, release-note input,
etc.) and who it is for._

## Title

_Working title for the document._

## Summary

_One or two sentences describing what this document covers._

## Draft content

_The main body of the draft, structured with headings appropriate to the
artifact type. Use clear, direct language._

## Placeholders and unconfirmed details

_A list of every `TODO`/placeholder in the draft that needs human confirmation._

## Assumptions made while drafting

_Anything inferred to keep the draft coherent, so the human can verify it._

## Source material used

_Which supplied briefs, plans, notes, or files this draft is based on._

## Open questions

_What the human should decide or confirm before this draft is used._
